---
title: "Data Viz Final Project: Pharmacies in Chicago"
format: html
---

```{python}
# load packages
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from shapely import wkt
import pydeck as pdk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
# load data
data_path = 'C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Pharmacy_Status_-_Historical_20260302.csv'
df_pharm = pd.read_csv(data_path)
```

```{python}
# explore data
df_pharm.shape
df_pharm.head()
```


```{python}
# make pharmacy names in all caps
df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'] = df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].str.upper()
```

```{python}
# load gdf
census_gdf = gpd.read_file('C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Census_Tracts_20260302.geojson')
```

```{python}
# inspect data

# count geometry by type
print('Geometry type:', census_gdf.geom_type)

# count total number of features
print('\n N features:', len(census_gdf))

# get crs
print('\n Coordinate reference system:', census_gdf.crs)
```

```{python}
# create basic visualization
census_gdf.plot().set_axis_off()
```

```{python}
# load pharmacies as a geodataframe

# convert float to string
df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column'] = df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column'].astype(str)

# find problem coordinates
for index, row in df_pharm.iterrows():
    value=row['New Georeferenced Column']

    try:
        if pd.isna(value):
            raise ValueError('Missing Value')

            wkt.loads(value)
    except Exception:
        print(f'{index} [{len(value)}] {value!r}')


# drop nas
df_pharm = df_pharm.dropna(subset= ['New Georeferenced Column'])

# drop na strings
df_pharm = df_pharm[
    df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column']
    .str.lower()
    .ne('nan')
]

# create a safe parser to avoid crashing on rows
def safe_parser(x):
    try:
        return wkt.loads()
    except Exception:
        return None

# apply safe parser
df_pharm['geometry'] = (
    df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column']
    .apply(safe_parser)
)

# drop failed geometries
df_pharm = df_pharm.dropna(subset=['geometry'])

# load df_pharm as gdf
pharm_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(df_pharm, geometry='geometry', crs='EPSG:4326')
```


```{python}
# join gdfs
combined_gdf = gpd.sjoin(census_gdf, pharm_gdf, 
    how='inner',
    predicate='intersects')

# check object type
print('Object type:', type(combined_gdf))

# check geometry type
print()

```

```{python}
assert (census_gdf.crs == pharm_gdf.crs)
```

```{python}
# set up plot
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8,6))

# plot chicago in blue
combined_gdf.plot(ax=ax, color='blue', alpha=0.5)

# plot pharmacies in orange
pharm_gdf.plt.scatter(ax=ax, color='orange', markersize=1.5)

ax.set_axis_off()
plt.show()
```
